text:
- [escalation] Google AI Studio: Google AI Studio correction requiring action to secure Gemini API access by June 19, 2026, with updated project and API key information.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed on the main branch.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert about a permanent failure with 429 rate-limiting error in the Daily workflow.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed on the main branch.

- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Weekly Audit Health Report workflow run has completely failed.
- [reply needed] Sir Richard: Rich Lang asks how to proceed with purchasing the Acer Aspire 16 AI laptop after reviewing Michael's research report.
- [scheduling] Peter Nordlund: Peter Nordlund confirms Michael's attendance at a Scriptural Reasoning event on Friday June 19 at Temple Beth Or at 6:00pm, and approves bringing cut fruit.
- [scheduling] reminders@drchrono.com: Appointment reminder for Monty Owens on Monday, June 22, 2026 at 10:30 AM PDT.
